text: Reports that the Italian government is talking to Tehran to secure safe passage for oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz are “totally wrong,” an Italian foreign ministry official said. According to ANSA, an Italian news service, the Prime Minister’s Office also denied that the government had initiated talks with Iran to clear passage for oil shipments.
title: Britain warns its citizens in Dubai they could be jailed for sharing photos of damage from airstrikes.

citability.title: Britain warns its citizens in Dubai they could be jailed for sharing photos of damage from airstrikes.
